scope: Venn and UpSet set-overlap chart family only

mapped_legacy_functions.plugin_usage: Builds the boolean item-by-set membership matrix for UpSet rendering.
Renders the UpSet bar chart from the boolean membership matrix.
Same semantics: set names map to unique item sets.
Same limitation: Venn is only rendered for two or three sets.

not_used.reason: UI-oriented Streamlit orchestration path. The plugin replaces it with a headless deterministic CLI path.
UI-oriented wrapper. The plugin calls the deterministic matrix and plotting helpers directly.
